summary: An epic 1983 show captured in an improved audience recording that delivers a near‑perfect listening experience, especially the unstoppable second set.
review: Both reviewers rave about this June 20 1983 performance, calling it “ridiculously good” and highlighting a second‑set that rolls nonstop as a banger. The audio is described as an upgraded audience tape – the best available until a soundboard source surfaces – with enjoyable clarity despite inherent limits.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently 5‑star reviews praising both the musical performance and the quality of the audience recording; strong show weight with minor recording limitations yields a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Improved audience tape praised as near‑best possible without an SBD; listeners note some inherent limits but find the sound enjoyable and clear enough for full appreciation.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as a continuous banger from start to finish, indicating strong pacing and momentum throughout.
